opinion: Unqualified on both RBI and RBILP consolidated statements
critical_audit_matters: Fair value of operating lease assets, lease liabilities and reacquired franchise rights acquired in Carrols business combination
Recoverability assessment of Firehouse Subs brand ($816M indefinite-lived intangible)

revenue_recognition.supply_chain_sales: Revenue recognized upon transfer of control (delivery). Shipping costs = fulfillment costs in cost of sales.
revenue_recognition.company_restaurant_sales: Recognized at point of sale. Taxes excluded.
revenue_recognition.franchise_revenues: Royalties recognized as franchise sales occur (sales-based royalty). Initial/renewal fees recognized straight-line over agreement term. Franchise license + pre-opening + ongoing services bundled into single performance obligation (Franchise PO).
revenue_recognition.advertising_revenues: Franchisee contributions calculated as % of sales. Not separately distinct from Franchise PO.
revenue_recognition.gift_card_breakage: Recognized proportionately as gift cards are redeemed using estimated historical breakage rate.
revenue_recognition.franchisee_incentives: Capitalized and amortized as reduction in franchise/property revenue over contract term.

useful_lives.leasehold_improvements: lesser of lease term or useful life

impairment.goodwill_and_brands: Tested annually as of October 1. Qualitative or quantitative assessment. No impairment recognized in 2022, 2023, or 2024.
impairment.long_lived_assets: Tested when events indicate carrying amount may not be recoverable. Compared to undiscounted future cash flows.

income_tax.valuation_allowance_note: Massive increase in 2023 ($194M to $1,563M) from additions related to deferred tax assets generated

lessee_accounting.discount_rate_basis: Incremental borrowing rate based on secured borrowings + implied spreads

carrols_acquisition_note.funded_by: Cash on hand + $750M incremental term loan borrowings

debt_structure.issuers: 1011778 B.C. Unlimited Liability Company (Parent Issuer) and New Red Finance Inc. (Co-Issuer)
debt_structure.debt_instruments: Senior Notes and variable rate term loans

related_party_transactions.3g_capital: 3G Restaurant Brands Holdings LP owns ~26% voting power of RBI
related_party_transactions.carrols_pre_acquisition: 15% equity interest prior to May 2024; franchise and lease agreements
related_party_transactions.bkc_officers_stock_interests: Officers hold publicly traded shares in General Mills, J&J, Kraft Heinz, PepsiCo (approved suppliers)

advertising_fund_accounting.treatment: Advertising contributions received must be spent on advertising, product development, marketing. Not distinct performance obligation. Consolidated with Franchise PO.
advertising_fund_accounting.company_restaurant_contributions: Same rate as franchisees, may be reduced for payments to third-party lenders

subsequent_events: No specific subsequent events disclosed beyond the amendment date of January 16, 2026

supplier_finance_program.description: Tim Hortons supply chain finance program via global financial institution
